summary: A social media app similar to Instagram with music streaming, podcasting features, posts/reels, chat, themes, and authentication. Games are excluded from initial build.
architectural_notes: Social media platform similar to Instagram
Music streaming and podcast functionality required
Theme customization per user for chat interface
known_issues: Play Store deployment not supported - app will deploy to Internet Computer
Music licensing requirements not addressed for streaming service
Real-time video chat during gameplay excluded from initial scope

existing_features.title: Create a social feed where users can create, view, and interact with posts similar to Instagram, including image posts with captions, like functionality, and comment sections
Implement a reels feature for short-form video content with vertical scrolling, similar to Instagram Reels
Build a direct messaging system enabling one-on-one and group chat with text messages
Create user profiles with customizable themes, profile pictures, bio, and display of user posts and activity
Implement theme customization allowing users to switch between dark and light themes, and customize their chat interface themes individually
Build a music streaming system similar to Spotify with playback controls, playlist creation, and a music library for browsing and playing audio tracks
Create a podcast section where users can discover, listen to, and manage podcast episodes with episode lists and playback functionality
Implement authentication system supporting email, phone number, and Google login with username creation and Internet Identity integration
Add an orange verification badge system that appears next to usernames for verified accounts, replacing the traditional blue checkmark

Design a vibrant, engaging frontend with a warm, energetic color palette (oranges, corals, warm yellows) for the social and music sections, creating an inviting atmosphere that encourages user engagement and makes the app feel lively and approachable
Update the application name from 'SoundWave Social' to 'Lunita' in the HTML title tag in frontend/index.html
Update any visible application branding text in the Layout component header to display 'Lunita' instead of the current application name
Update the landing page hero section in frontend/src/pages/Home.tsx to reflect 'Lunita' as the application name in the main heading and introductory text
Add a bottom navigation bar to the frontend layout that displays navigation options for Music, Chat (Messages), Reels, and Podcasts sections, ensuring it is visible on mobile and desktop viewports
Design and generate a new custom logo for the Lunita application that reflects the warm, vibrant brand identity with oranges and corals
Replace the current application logo/branding in the Layout component header and Home page hero section with the newly designed Lunita logo

Update the application's color scheme across the entire frontend by replacing the current warm orange and coral palette with a new distinctive color palette that makes the brand more unique and visually distinct
Design and generate a completely new unique logo for the Lunita application that is visually distinctive and does not resemble the current logo design
Replace all instances of the current Lunita logo throughout the application with the newly designed unique logo, including the Layout component header and Home page hero section
Ensure the music library page displays all added songs in the TrackList component with functional play controls
Ensure the podcasts page displays all added podcasts in a grid layout with expandable episode lists that are playable

new_feature_requests.summary: Instagram-like social features (posts, reels, chat, profiles)
Music streaming system similar to Spotify
Dark/light theme with user customization for chat
Authentication via email/number/Google login with username creation
Orange verification badge (instead of blue tick)
Add navigation options for Music, Chat, Reels, and Podcasts at the bottom
Populate the music library with a collection of songs including track metadata (title, artist, album, duration) and audio file references
Add podcast content to the backend including podcast metadata (title, description, host) and episode information (episode titles, descriptions, audio references)
